name: ICS Unsafe Function Code Execution
description: Detects execution of unsafe function codes on ICS/SCADA protocols (Modbus, DNP3)
query:
// ICS Unsafe Function Code Detection (NDR)
// Write operations or dangerous function codes in industrial protocols
events from ndr_flow
where (protocol = "modbus" and function_code in (5, 6, 15, 16))
  or (protocol = "dnp3" and function_code in (2, 129))
  or (protocol = "bacnet" and service = "WriteProperty")
  or (protocol = "enip" and command_code in ("75", "76"))
  or alert_type = "ics_unsafe_command"
group by source_ip, destination_ip, protocol
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
